The '''Winter Palace''' was the home of [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron]], and the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] clan shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The palace was located on a remote island on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], near the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] equator. The island was hot, humid, and contained many trees and vines, but many [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] considered it to be beautiful. The Palace was lavish; Jiliac's main audience chamber was huge with the main aisle leading up to his dais lined with an expensive carpet, while the floors were made of gleaming stone kept highly polished. The antichamber to the throne room had high-skylighted ceilings and was built from lightly colored stone. The high walls were hung with beautiful tapestries said to be woven by Jiliac's prisoners while they awaited execution in his dungeons.

[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] delivered a message from [[Zavval]] to Jiliac's Winter Palace during the struggle for control over the [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesian]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] facilities in [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]]. [[Durga Besadii Tai]] and [[Guri]] later visited the Winter Palace to confront Jiliac and invoke the [[Old Law]].

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Wikipedia:Winter Palace|Winter Palace]] is a real palace in Saint Petersburg, Russia.
